# Read the uploaded JSON files and inspect structure. 
import json, sys, os, re, unicodedata
qpath = "/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json"
hpath = "/mnt/data/file-GTpsjEG93EG6BAuDqWqgAJ-six_hadith_books.json"
print("Exists q:", os.path.exists(qpath))
print("Exists h:", os.path.exists(hpath))
with open(qpath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    qdata = json.load(f)
with open(hpath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hdata = json.load(f)
# Show sample entries counts and keys
print("Q verses:", len(qdata))
print("Q sample keys:", list(qdata[0].keys())[:50])
print("H entries:", len(hdata))
print("H sample keys:", list(hdata[0].keys())[:50])
# print first few q entries
for i in range(5):
    print(i, qdata[i].get('ayah_text')[:120])

response_context = """

وقال تعالى: "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسِّسُ فِي نَفْسِهِ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْكُمْ وَلَكِنْ لا تُبْصِرُونَ" [ق:16].
وقال تعالى: "وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ" [الأنبياء:58].

وقال تعالى: "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسِّسُ فِي نَفْسِهِ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْكُمْ وَلَكِنْ لا تُبْصِرُونَ" [ق:16].

وقال تعالى: "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسِّسُ فِي نَفْسِهِ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْكُمْ وَلَكِنْ لا تُبْصِرُونَ" [ق:16].
وقال تعالى: "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسِّسُ فِي نَفْسِهِ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْكُمْ وَلَكِنْ لا تُبْصِرُونَ" [ق:16].
"""
start = 745
end = 873
full_sub = response_context[start:end]
snippet = "وَلَقَدْ خ...ُبْصِرُونَ"
full_sub, len(response_context), start, end

# Build normalization function for Arabic
import re
def normalize_ar(text):
    # Normalize unicode
    text = unicodedata.normalize("NFKD", text)
    # Remove tashkeel/diacritics
    # Arabic diacritic ranges
    tashkeel_re = re.compile('[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED\u08D3-\u08E1\u08FE\uFE70-\uFEFF]')
    text = tashkeel_re.sub('', text)
    # remove tatweel
    text = text.replace('\u0640','')
    # replace various hamza forms with plain alef or hamza representation
    text = text.replace('إ','ا').replace('أ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    # map hamza on waw/ya to hamza (optional): replace ؤ ئ with ء
    text = text.replace('ؤ','ء').replace('ئ','ء')
    # remove punctuation (Arabic and Latin)
    punct = r'''[,\.:"'\/\-\(\)\[\]\{\}؟!,؛:"«»—–…؛ـ]'''
    text = re.sub(punct, ' ', text)
    # remove other punctuation or symbols
    text = re.sub(r'[@#$%^&*_+=<>~`|\\…]', ' ', text)
    # remove extra spaces
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    # lower (not needed)
    return text

# create normalized index for qdata ayah_text
norm_index = []
for i, ay in enumerate(qdata):
    ay_text = ay.get('ayah_text','')
    norm = normalize_ar(ay_text)
    norm_index.append((i, norm, ay_text, ay['surah_id'], ay['ayah_id'], ay['surah_name']))

# print some normalized entries for inspection where matching word 'خلقنا' appears
search = "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسِّسُ"
print("Normalized search:", normalize_ar(search))
candidates = [t for t in norm_index if 'خلقنا' in t[1]]
len(candidates), candidates[:5]

target = "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسِّسُ فِي نَفْسِهِ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْكُمْ وَلَكِنْ لا تُبْصِرُونَ"
ntarget = normalize_ar(target)
ntarget
cands = [t for t in norm_index if 'نعلم' in t[1] and 'توسس' in t[1] and ('اقرب' in t[1] or 'حبل' in t[1])]
len(cands)

# search for 'لا تبصرون' in normalized qdata
target_norm = normalize_ar("لا تُبْصِرُونَ")
matches = [t for t in norm_index if 'تبصرون' in t[1] or 'تبصرون' in t[1]]
len(matches), [ (t[3],t[4], t[2]) for t in matches[:20] ]

# search for entries containing normalized substrings
def find_by_norm_contains(subs):
    sub = normalize_ar(subs)
    return [t for t in norm_index if sub in t[1]]

# try possible variations
variations = [
    "خلقنا الانسان ونعلم ما توسس في نفسه",
    "خلقنا الانسان ونعلم ما تو سس في نفسه",
    "خلقنا الانسان ونعلم ما توسويس",
    "خلقنا الانسان ونعلم ما توَسِس",
    "ولقد خلقنا الانسان ونعلم ما توَسِس",
    "ولقد خلقنا الانسان ونعلم ما توَسِس في نفسه ونحن اقرب اليه",
    "نحن اقرب اليه منكم ولكن لا تبصرون"
]

for v in variations:
    res = find_by_norm_contains(v)
    print(v, len(res))
    for r in res[:5]:
        print(" ->", r[3], r[4], r[2])
    print("-----")

# Candidate from database
candidate = next((t['ayah_text'] for t in qdata if t['surah_id']==50 and t['ayah_id']==16), None)
candidate, len(candidate)
full_sub = full_sub  # extracted earlier
snippet = "وَلَقَدْ خ...ُبْصِرُونَ"

def token_f1(a,b):
    ta = normalize_ar(a).split()
    tb = normalize_ar(b).split()
    set_a = ta
    set_b = tb
    # Count overlaps considering multiplicity: use multiset intersection counts
    from collections import Counter
    ca = Counter(set_a)
    cb = Counter(set_b)
    common = sum((ca & cb).values())
    prec = common / len(set_a) if len(set_a)>0 else 0.0
    rec = common / len(set_b) if len(set_b)>0 else 0.0
    if prec+rec==0:
        f1 = 0.0
    else:
        f1 = 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)
    return {'f1':f1, 'prec':prec, 'rec':rec, 'tokens_a':set_a, 'tokens_b':set_b}

res_full = token_f1(candidate, full_sub)
res_snip = token_f1(candidate, snippet)
res_full, res_snip

import difflib

cand_norm = normalize_ar(candidate)
full_norm = normalize_ar(full_sub)
seq_ratio = difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, cand_norm, full_norm).ratio()
# compute LCS length
def lcs_len(a,b):
    # classic DP O(n*m) but okay since strings are short
    n,m = len(a), len(b)
    dp = [[0]*(m+1) for _ in range(n+1)]
    for i in range(n-1,-1,-1):
        for j in range(m-1,-1,-1):
            if a[i]==b[j]:
                dp[i][j] = 1 + dp[i+1][j+1]
            else:
                dp[i][j] = max(dp[i+1][j], dp[i][j+1])
    return dp[0][0]

lcs_length = lcs_len(cand_norm, full_norm)
lcs_ratio = lcs_length / max(len(cand_norm), len(full_norm))
cand_norm, full_norm, seq_ratio, lcs_length, lcs_ratio, len(cand_norm), len(full_norm)

# compute similarity between full_sub and each ayah_text in qdata using sequence ratio and token f1
from difflib import SequenceMatcher
best = None
best_f1 = 0
best_seq = 0
for t in qdata:
    ay = t['ayah_text']
    seq = SequenceMatcher(None, normalize_ar(ay), normalize_ar(full_sub)).ratio()
    f1 = token_f1(ay, full_sub)['f1']
    if seq > best_seq:
        best_seq = seq
        best = (t, seq, f1)
    if f1 > best_f1:
        best_f1 = f1

best_seq, best[0]['surah_id'], best[0]['ayah_id'], best[0]['ayah_text'][:120], best[1], best[2], best_f1
